faq.question: How can I check heat risk risk for a specific property in Cardiff South?

faq.answer: Insurance premiums in Cardiff South can be influenced by heat risk risk. Higher-risk properties may face higher premiums or excesses. A full climate report includes insurance cost projections.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 4.35% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
